name: Lazarus Subject
description: A soldier preserved by the Gray Wastes' chemical environment and subsequently reanimated by Project Lazarus's animating compound. Still wears the uniform — Terran or Aetherian, depending on which war it died in. Moves in a lurching, purposeful gait. Does not react to pain. Does not stop for wounds that would drop a living soldier. The crystals growing through its flesh glow a dull, sickly green.
